title: Dancing through The Days with Maria Nurmela and Ville Oinonen
content:
The Days Project, an intergenerational dance performance by Maria Nurmela and Ville Oinonen, arrives in Luxembourg on 21.3.

The post Dancing through The Days with Maria Nurmela and Ville Oinonen appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Svenska kulturfonden internship at the Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux
content:
Svenska kulturfonden is accepting applications for internships starting in August 2026. Read the full call in Swedish.
